mapper.select: SELECT id, admin_id, token, expire_time, create_time FROM admin_token WHERE token = #{token} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, admin_id, token, expire_time, create_time FROM admin_token WHERE admin_id = #{adminId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_token(admin_id, token, expire_time) VALUES(#{adminId}, #{token}, #{expireTime})
